title: Share this?
question: Do you want to share this {kind}?
description: A copy will be uploaded to your personal workspace and made public. Your local file stays on your disk, untouched.
successDescription: Your copy now lives in your personal workspace and anyone with the link can view it.
errorDescription: Something went wrong while uploading. Please try again.
offline: You need an internet connection to share.
needAccount: Sign in to share to your personal workspace.
